seoTitle: How to Embed Typeform in Shopify
metaDescription: Learn how to add a Typeform to your Shopify store's product, landing, or contact pages using the embed code and inline or popup options.
intro: Adding an interactive form to a Shopify store can help capture leads or feedback without sending customers away from your site. This guide covers how to generate a Typeform embed code and add it to your Shopify store's pages, with different display options to fit your store's design.

steps.heading: Create or open your Typeform
steps.body: Build the form you want on your Shopify store, or open an existing one you plan to embed.

steps.heading: Copy the embed code
steps.body: Generate the embed code from Typeform's share settings so it's ready to add to your Shopify pages.

steps.heading: Add Typeform to Shopify
steps.body: Paste the embed code into the appropriate section of your Shopify theme or page editor, placing it on product, landing, or contact pages as needed.

faq.question: Can I place a Typeform on a Shopify product page?
faq.answer: Yes, the embed code can be added to product pages, landing pages, or contact pages within your Shopify store.

faq.question: What embedding styles are available for Shopify?
faq.answer: You can choose between inline forms, popups, and full-page forms depending on how you want the form to appear on your store.

faq.question: Will the form match my Shopify store's branding?
faq.answer: You can customize the Typeform's theme and colors before embedding it so it fits better with your store's overall design.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to embed Typeform in Shopify?
faq.answer: Basic familiarity with adding HTML to your Shopify theme is helpful, but the embed code itself is provided directly by Typeform, keeping the process straightforward.
